The two developed a plot based on a group of diverse adven- turers searching for an anclent artifact to rid the world of an mcient, legendary evil-dragons. "Dragons In some of the games were so wimpy a party of gully dwarves could have killed them. There were both males and females, though It was not always easy to tell the sexes apart. The femaics lacked whlskers on thelr chhs but had them on thelr cheeks. They wore a tattered ouersklrt wrapped around thelr walsts extendlng to thelr bony knees. Othenulse, they were euery blt as ugly as thelr male counterparts.
